commit.message:
feat(security): implement 24 security hardening plans from DDoS risk analysis (#20)

* docs: add comprehensive DDoS risk analysis for Zajel infrastructure

Analyzes all server components (CF Workers Bootstrap, VPS Signaling,
Federation Layer) against DDoS attack vectors. Key findings:
- P2P architecture provides inherent resilience for existing connections
- VPS servers are the primary attack surface (no infra-level protection)
- Bootstrap registry auth (SERVER_REGISTRY_SECRET) must be verified
- Federation reconnect bug (S4) weakens self-healing capability
- Overall risk: MEDIUM with actionable recommendations

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VkZsDCbQP7pLGHpe8ATtAE

* feat: add anomaly detection to server registry for federation monitoring

Adds behavioral anomaly detection that runs on every heartbeat to detect
misbehaving servers: metric spikes/drops, inconsistent metrics, ghost
servers, and fleet outliers. Scores accumulate with exponential decay,
and servers exceeding the quarantine threshold are hidden from public
listing. Includes GET /servers/anomalies admin endpoint.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VkZsDCbQP7pLGHpe8ATtAE

* feat: add Ed25519 build signing for federation server verification

Build-time: sign-build script hashes dist/ contents and signs with
Ed25519 key, writing a build-manifest.json into the artifact.

Runtime: VPS servers load the manifest at startup and include
buildHash + buildSignature + buildSigningKey in registration and
heartbeat payloads to the bootstrap registry.

Registry: CF Workers verify Ed25519 signatures using Web Crypto API.
TRUSTED_BUILD_KEYS env var configures accepted signing keys. Servers
with invalid/missing signatures are marked buildVerified=false and
visible in the /servers/anomalies admin endpoint.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VkZsDCbQP7pLGHpe8ATtAE

* feat: CI-managed trusted build keys via POST /servers/trusted-keys

Trusted build signing keys are now managed dynamically by CI instead
of requiring a static env var and redeployment. CI calls
POST /servers/trusted-keys (authenticated with CI_UPLOAD_SECRET) after
each build to register the signing public key. Keys are persisted in
DO storage and take precedence over the TRUSTED_BUILD_KEYS env var
fallback.

The sign-build script now auto-uploads the public key to the bootstrap
registry when ZAJEL_BOOTSTRAP_URL and CI_UPLOAD_SECRET are set.

Supports three mutation modes: keys (replace all), addKeys (append),
removeKeys (revoke). GET /servers/trusted-keys is public since these
are public keys.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VkZsDCbQP7pLGHpe8ATtAE

* fix: require CI_UPLOAD_SECRET auth on GET /servers/trusted-keys

The trusted key list was publicly readable. While these are public keys,
exposing the trusted key set leaks operational information. Now both
GET and POST /servers/trusted-keys require CI_UPLOAD_SECRET auth.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VkZsDCbQP7pLGHpe8ATtAE

* feat: encrypt trusted build keys at rest in DO storage

Trusted keys are now encrypted with AES-256-GCM before being stored in
Durable Object storage. The encryption key is derived from CI_UPLOAD_SECRET
via HKDF-SHA256 so that raw DO storage access cannot reveal the trusted
key set.

- Added deriveStorageKey, encryptKeys, decryptKeys to BuildVerifier
- setTrustedKeys encrypts before storage.put
- loadTrustedKeys and getTrustedKeys decrypt on read
- Legacy plaintext format is still readable (migration path)
- 5 new tests covering encrypted storage, decryption, and legacy compat

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VkZsDCbQP7pLGHpe8ATtAE

* docs: add federation security hardening roadmap and competitive research

Codebase audit of server registry, attestation, CORS, timing-safe, and
rate limiter modules identifying 18 findings across 4 priority tiers.
Industry research covering Sigstore, TUF, SLSA, Matrix federation,
Jitsi E2EE, Cloudflare DO security, and NIST SP 800-57 key management.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VkZsDCbQP7pLGHpe8ATtAE

* docs: add 24 security stories from DDoS risk analysis

Comprehensive security audit with deep code analysis covering:
- Immediate (001-004): federation reconnect, trusted keys bypass, log leakage, registry auth
- This Week (005-010): heartbeat replay, CORS, JWT in URL, headers, audit, timing-safe
- This Sprint (011-015): rate limiting, key expiry, NaN validation, test coverage, reverse proxy
- Medium-Term (016-020): SLSA, transparency log, SDP signing, DO sharding, IP reputation
- Long-Term (021-024): TUF hierarchy, Sigstore, threshold signing, post-quantum migration

Each story includes exact code references, reproduction steps, and proposed fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add 24 security implementation plans

Detailed implementation plans for each security story (001-024),
including specific files to modify, before/after code snippets,
test plans, rollback risks, and dependency analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add 24 implementation plan reviews

Each plan reviewed against actual source code for accuracy of
file paths, line numbers, code snippets, and completeness of
acceptance criteria coverage.

Results: 14 PASS WITH NOTES, 10 NEEDS REVISION

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Plan 004: Registry secret bypass fix (registration auth)

- Plan 008: Missing security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type)
- Plan 009: Key read audit log (AuditLogDO)
- Plan 010: Timing-safe HMAC normalize
- Plan 011: Per-endpoint rate limiting
- Plan 012: Key expiry / cryptoperiod enforcement
- Plan 013: NaN input validation (numeric-validation utility)
- Plan 014: Security test coverage (security test suite)
- Plan 015: VPS reverse proxy IP extraction
- Plan 016: SLSA build provenance
- Plan 017: Key transparency log
- Plan 018: SDP signing (Ed25519 message signing in crypto service)
- Plan 019: DO sharding (consistent hash ring)
- Plan 020: IP reputation scoring
- Plan 021: TUF role hierarchy (metadata DO + client verifier)
- Plan 022: Sigstore keyless signing (cosign verifier)
- Plan 023: Threshold signing (FROST DKG)
- Plan 024: Post-quantum migration (ML-KEM-768 hybrid KEM)

Also fixes test compatibility issues:
- Fix @noble/post-quantum import paths (.js extension)

* fix(server-vps): implement ip reputation storage methods and fix TS4111 errors

Three CI failures on the claude/ddos-risk-analysis-USh5i branch:

1. TypeScript build failure (TS4111) in bootstrap-client.ts: accessing
   BuildManifest properties via dot notation on a Record<string, unknown>
   body object violates noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature. Fixed by using
   bracket notation (body['buildHash'] etc.) at both call sites.

2. Missing IPReputationEntry type and 5 missing method signatures in the
   Storage interface (incrementReputation, getReputation, getTopOffenders,
   cleanupOldReputationEvents, setReputation). ip-reputation.ts was importing
   a type and calling methods that did not exist in the interface.

3. Missing SQLite implementation for all 5 reputation methods and missing
   migration 003_ip_reputation.sql from the init() migrations list. Also
   fixed: score decay logic (halve after 24h, quarter after 48h) missing
   from VPSReputationManager.getScore(), and IP event log hash must use
   'zajel-rep:' prefix to match test expectations.

All 480 server-vps tests now pass and tsc build is clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): bake SIGNALING_URL into APK for direct VPS connection

Bootstrap server at signal.zajel.qa.hamzalabs.dev returns empty
server list, so the app inside the Android emulator could never
discover a signaling server. This caused 3 E2E test failures:
- test_online_after_launch
- test_can_get_pairing_code
- test_invalid_pairing_code_handled

Fix: Add --dart-define=SIGNALING_URL from VPS_QA_WS_URL GitHub
variable to the APK build. Also update connect_screen.dart to
use the direct URL when available, matching the existing logic
in AppInitializationService.connectSignaling().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Revert "fix(ci): bake SIGNALING_URL into APK for direct VPS connection"

This reverts commit 8437f696a56e5fcc0671077d0e04ee49dcd0f505.

* fix(ci): configure SERVER_REGISTRY_SECRET for VPS bootstrap registration

VPS servers failed to register with the bootstrap CF Worker because
SERVER_REGISTRY_SECRET was never configured. The CF Worker uses
fail-closed auth (returns 503 when secret is unset), so all
POST /servers requests were rejected, leaving /servers returning
an empty list. This caused the app to find no signaling servers.

Changes:
- Add "Sync registry secret to CF Worker" step in deploy-cf-signaling
- Pass SERVER_REGISTRY_SECRET to VPS via SSH envs
- Add ZAJEL_REGISTRY_SECRET to start-qa.sh so the VPS server includes
  the bearer token when self-registering with bootstrap
- Add Authorization header to the manual registration fallback curl
- Created SERVER_REGISTRY_SECRET GitHub secret

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(tests): make concurrent heartbeat test order-independent

The test assumed statuses[0] would always be the first heartbeat
processed, but Promise.all doesn't guarantee execution order in
the mock environment (no real DO blockConcurrencyWhile). On CI,
a different microtask scheduling causes a different request to
win the race, making statuses[0] return 429 instead of 200.

Fix: assert exactly 1 success and 2 rate-limited without assuming
which array index succeeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(app): skip signaling connection in integration tests

The CI pipeline passes --dart-define=INTEGRATION_TEST=true but the
app never checked it. Now that bootstrap registration works (servers
are discoverable), connectSignaling() successfully connects and
overwrites mock pairing codes injected by integration tests.

Add Environment.isIntegrationTest flag and skip signaling connection
when true, so integration tests control the pairing code via
provider overrides without it being replaced by a real server code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(e2e): handle transient signaling registration races in pairing

Two fixes for flaky Phase D2 Android E2E failures:

1. connect_to_redirect() now waits for server's "registered" response
   before returning, preventing pair_with() from racing ahead

2. HeadlessBob.pair_with() retries up to 3 times on transient errors
   ("Not registered" / "could not be processed") with 3s delay

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(headless-client): add diagnostics module for structured error tracking

Add categorization, deduplication, PII scrubbing, and error tracking to the
headless client, mirroring the Flutter app's diagnostics stack. Integrates
via sys.excepthook, threading.excepthook, and logging.Handler hooks with
CLI support (--diagnostics flag and diagnostics subcommand).

128 new tests covering models, categorizer, signature, scrubber, and tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(diagnostics): use rfind + exclusion list for app frame detection

The simple `zajel/` substring check matched repo checkout paths on CI
(e.g. /home/runner/work/zajel/zajel/packages/...), causing test frames
to be treated as app frames. Now uses rfind to get the last `zajel/`
occurrence and excludes paths containing tests/, packages/, etc.

override them. Structural interventions (checkpoint prompts) work by actively

commit.message:
feat: Self-Documentation Protocol + セマンティック資産登録 + PROMPT_CONTEXT.md

## 変更内容

### 1. PROMPT_CONTEXT.md (新規)
AI コンテキスト永続化ドキュメント。将来のセッションが同一前提で作業継続できるよう
以下を集約:
- scrcpy 標準フラグ (-S, --always-on-top, --no-audio, -m 800)
- 意思決定優先順位 (Asset Match > Finger Blob > OCR > SDE)
- セマンティックエンジン・AssetManager の仕様
- 安全制約 (タップ間隔 1.0秒以上)
- 既知のゲーム画面遷移マップ
- Self-Documentation Protocol の定義

### 2. crawler/configs/scrcpy_config.json (新規)
scrcpy フラグを JSON で定義。起動コマンドテンプレートと安全制約も記載。

### 3. StrategicDecisionEngine.learn_from_instruction() (追加)
曖昧な指示から UI 要素を自律的に抽出・命名・保存するメソッド:
- 「矢印はボタン」→ 矢印を検出 → "btn_arrow" として AssetManager に即時追加
- 「スキップはボタン」→ OCR でスキップ検出 → "btn_skip" として保存
- 役割マップ: ボタン→btn, アイコン→icon, タブ→tab
- 要素マップ: 矢印→arrow, スキップ→skip, OK→ok, etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf: fix 30+ CRITICAL N+1 queries and performance bottlenecks across admin

Stats APIs:

Organization:
- assignment-rules: N+1 user lookup → single batch query
- teams list: removed full members include (-80% payload)
- dealers: added missing pagination (skip/take)

Work Reports:
- streak calc: 365 sequential findFirst → 1 findMany + in-memory
- overview team/monthly/weekly trends: N+1 loops → single query each

Ad Manager:
- campaigns: added pagination, metrics scoped to current page only
- bid simulation: sequential 40s → parallel batched 4-6s
- lead attribution: N individual updates → batched $transaction
- budget overview: 3 sequential → 2 parallel queries
- conversion analysis: removed 100% duplicate platform spend query
- ROAS analysis: sequential → parallel groupBy

Vehicle Data:
- EP unmatched: N+1 findFirst per group → single groupBy
- trims: fixed incorrect in-memory sort after DB pagination
- orphan trims: N+1 suggestions → batch lineup query
- batch-price-corrections: N findFirst → single findMany + Set
- QualitySummaryWidget: raw fetch → React Query (10min cache)

System & Analytics:
- scraping-logs: added pagination + select (exclude large JSON)
- ETL import: 3N sequential → batched $transaction
- payment-requests: full table scan → relation filter
- web analytics: 40-60 queries → summary-only default (~5 queries)
- UV count: findMany+.length → COUNT(DISTINCT) raw SQL
- chart rendering: O(n²) → O(n) pre-computed max

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf: fix 80+ HIGH/MEDIUM issues across admin (Promise.all, memoization, pagination, caching)

CRM + Sales:

- leads: add min 2-char search guard, parallelize phone duplicate check
- by-dayofweek: replace JS aggregation with raw SQL GROUP BY

Organization:
- teams detail: reduce user dropdown pageSize, targeted state updates
- team members stats: combine duplicate groupBy into single SQL

Ad Manager:
- campaigns detail: add take:50 to ad copies
- keywords: cache filter options, add take/orderBy to rank_history
- creative: batch version performance queries
- competitor summary: merge 4 sequential queries into single CTE SQL
- sync-status: add take:5000, debounce sync button
- ranking: DB-level pagination instead of client-side
- analysis pages: add LIMIT to landing-pages, geographic, recommendations
- export: reduce take limits, add date range guards
- dashboard: increase staleTime to 5min
- excel parseStore: add 1hr TTL cleanup
- attribution: useMemo for CPA/ROAS calculations

Vehicle + Marketing:
- generations: reduce nested includes in list view
- news: add server-side pagination
- reviews: debounce sort order change, parallelize queries
- banners: lazy loading images, remove N+1 pre-check
- traffic-analytics: parallelize duplicate groupBy queries

Reports:
- daily/weekly reports: parallelize aggregation queries
- daily/weekly: remove duplicate session calls
- calendar events/unified: add take:500 limits
- stats: eliminate duplicate assignedLeadIds query
- overview: use groupBy+_sum for top performers

System + ETL:
- logs: exclude rawData/rawAiResponse from list
- scraping-log detail: truncate JSON preview to 100 lines
- fuzzy-matcher: add in-memory cache with TTL
- contract-importer: batch lead/dealer lookups

feat(auto_pilot): StrategicDecisionEngine + AssetManager require_ocr修正

## 変更内容

### 1. AssetManager — require_ocr 条件フィルタ (誤発火根絶)
- map_arrow.json に `require_ocr: ["矢印をタップ"]` を追加
- `AssetManager.match()` に `ocr_texts` パラメータを追加
- require_ocr キーワードが OCR テキストにない場合はテンプレートをスキップ
- `save_template()` に `require_ocr` パラメータを追加
- これにより gacha/character 画面での MAP_ARROW_TAP 誤発火を根絶

### 2. StrategicDecisionEngine — UIアフォーダンス検知と行動予測システム
- `find_buttons()`: エッジ検出 + 輪郭抽出でボタン候補領域を検出
  - 色彩意味論: orange(10) > red(9) > blue(7) > green(6) > ... の優先度
  - アスペクト比・サイズフィルタでボタン形状を特定
- `predict_outcome()`: PREDICTION_MAP (30キーワード) でタップ後の結果を予測
  - 長いキーワード優先マッチング ("通常攻撃" > "攻撃")
- `log_prediction()`: `[PREDICTION] Tapping 'OK' -> Expecting CONFIRM: ...` をログ出力
- `verify_and_learn()`: タップ後の phash 変化で予測の正否を検証
  - SUCCESS/NO_CHANGE を knowledge_base.json に蓄積
  - 10タップごとに自動保存
